title: armeria maritima var. humilis
intro: Armeria maritima var. humilis, also known as the dwarf thrift or low-growing thrift, is a variety of the sea thrift plant that is native to the coastal regions of Europe and North America. It is a low-growing, evergreen perennial plant with small white flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Armeria maritima var. humilis contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wound healing, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Armeria maritima var. humilis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and have been traditionally used to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
